item.title: How do you think Miyazaki responded to this?
item.description: FP Edit: To be clear. AI is a tool. However, AI based on the work of artists and permission to use said art wasn't given is categorically bad. Most Viral Edit: thanks for the interaction! Send me pics! That's all. Edit2: This post is showing me a lot of people I can block as they have bad faith arguments. Thanks trolls.

item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Imigurians have made a new special day...
item.description: Story time... My grandfather fought in the Pacific in WW2. My great uncle fought in Europe. My GUncle was in one of the units that liberated one of the camps. My dad died when I was 2, both of these men stepped in and became dads to me and my brother. I learned a lot from them. They rarely talked about their times in the war but when they did I could tell they were still there. My GUncle couldn't talk about when he liberated the camp, when he did he'd just break down and cry and say "never let it happen again". I had a job while in college in the Jewish Home for the Aged. Now I'm not Jewish at all, it was a job driving an adult day care bus. But there were camp survivors in that group. I helped care for them. I saw their tattoos, heard their stories, those that would share. I'm 57 years old and both men have long passed. They both went on to build lives, my Grandpa had a fleet of combines that would be hired out to harvest. My GUncle was the sheriff of the county next to where my grandparents lived. The one and only barfight I was in was in my early 20's. I was fresh out of college, back home (grandparent's were always my home) and at a memorial for my GUncle. I was at a bar with friends when a holocaust denier was spouting his bullshit. I told asked him to stop, it bothered me. Told him my GUncle was there, saw it first hand. He flat out told me to my face my GUncle was a liar and was paid off by the Zionists to lie. Now, I'm a big guy, built like a brick shithouse (per my Grandpa) but am not a violent person. I'm verbally aggressive and would rather fight with words. But without realizing it was punched this guy. His two friends jumped me and I was there, my friends in shock, trading blows with these 3 guys. Apparently I scared the shit out of my friends, they said it was like I didn't feel it (I didn't at the time, did the day after) and I punch like a steel beam. Cops showed up, we were all in cuffs, cop asked me why I started it. I told him why. Turns out he knew my GUncle, worked under him. Told me he'd have done the same. No one was arrested and we were all sent home. I spent at least 15 years debating people that believed all sorts of nonsense. Was a member of the Skeptic Society for a while. I learned that you can't reason people out of a belief they weren't reasoned into. Remember: "The Paradox of Tolerance disappears if you look at tolerance, NOT as a moral standard, but as a social contract. If someone does not abide by the terms of the contract, they are not covered by it. In other words, the intolerant aren't deserving of your tolerance" Therefore, punch a goddamn Nazi.
item.dc:creator: MightyUrto

item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: Thank you Imgur community.
item.description: Got a new job after being unemployed for about 6 months. The job is shit and is just something to keep me going until I find something better. Everyone I've worked with so far has been a right-wing nutcase. The guy I was paired with on Friday had the Punisher logo as his phone background and kept talking about Joe Rogan podcasts. The only reason I haven't already walked away is that once I finish my training I'll be working alone and wont have to interact with these idiots. I was starting to think that the entire world had gone to shit, then you (in)glorious bastards rose up to show the world what we think about Nazis. Thank you.
item.dc:creator: TruthJusticeFreedomAndAHardBoiledEgg

item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: Apparently it's my cake day... Have some math memes
item.description:
I like to put bad graphs up on the screen with no explanation and have my students figure out what's wrong
We then talk about the source of the graph, and possible motivations behind the graph
This one is not so much a meme as a depressing graph.
Sometimes graphs are just dumb, but we also talk about choosing the right type of graph for the data
This one is just all over the place. What in the world was the population of interest?
COVID times were full of terrible graphs
The person that made the vertical axis must have been on some good drugs
Even Canadians make bad graphs
item.dc:creator: acemathematician

item.title: Don't mind me. I'm just watching an animated mural of nazis receiving free dental alignments, and enjoying every second of it.
item.description: By far my favorite event on Imgur this year. I think I took a year off my mouse hitting all those upvote arrows. Just thinking out loud here, but I'm pretty sure Sarah and Alan would have loved this. ~Ralek
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: Some programming humor for a niche audience (to get you started for Monday)
item.description:
1. It took some time for them to catch up
2. Junior vs Senior shenanigans
3. Live footage of a senior dev fixing the code on prod
4. Nah, maan
5
6. Release it worldwide cowards
7
8
9. Side note, but I loved this episode of Dexter
10
11. IF IF IF
12. Your friendly neighborhood catgirl hacker
13
14. Jeez, I've heard this before, seems to be actually true...
15. Yap... god damn it! Anyway, I have to admit that I am making a game and it's inspired partly by The Stanley Parable and if you are into this type of humor I think you might like it. Please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ Thanks for supporting indie devs! P.S. HAVE A GREAT WEEK :)

item.title: Let's gooo!
item.description: * woke up to most viral. Thank you, and let's go. Lots of negativity in the posts. I chose hope every day, and yes, some days I'm disappointed. The gain in the long run is always worth it.

item.title: I thought the app finally broke entirely
item.description: Turns out someone got banned for posting something about punching NAZIs? The best time to punch a NAZI was 86 years ago, the next best time is now!
item.dc:creator: stoutde

item.title: Three weeks no alcohol
item.description: I still continue to be somewhat impressed with myself. I thought 2 weeks would be a real milestone and now I think I'm heading to a month because so far I am doing it. I lost quite a bit of weight even though I'm not that big of a guy. I guess it was all those worthless empty calories. I sleep a lot better. My blood pressure is down. I feel more relaxed. The only bad thing is eating large quantities of candy or chocolate bars.....arg. Ps: thanks for the kind comments!
item.dc:creator: oldradios19772000

item.title: BOTTOM SHELF MEMES
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
